heading: Today
text: Occasional rain and showers from Rt. 9 south, decreasing to showers north to Lake George, Rt. 4, and Laconia, highs only in the upper 60s to low 70s.  A stray shower near Rt. 4, then dry north.  Clouds breaking for increasing afternoon sun farther north.  Highs in the 70s, near 80 far north.  Winds light, mainly east less than 10 mph, steadiest far south.

heading: Tonight
text: A few evening showers south tapering off.  Clearing north and west, some clouds lingering in southeast VT into southern NH.  Some areas of fog.  Lows in the 50s to low 60s.  Winds east up to 10 mph this evening, diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Wednesday
text: Some valley fog early, and morning clouds in southern NH.  Mostly sunny and warmer.  A bit more humid in the afternoon.  Highs ranging through the 80s.  Winds light, mainly west less than 10 mph.
